printed.name: Scooter
printed.setup: Standing, one foot on floor, leg bent, other foot against shoulder rest, leg bent, heel of foot on floor lined up with other foot, arms straight, hands placed on footbar, inside hand in line with shoulder, trunk in C curve position

movement.inhale: Straighten leg against shoulder rest (not completely)
movement.exhale: Bend leg, return to start position

cues: Keep standing leg bent and stable
